review: The first half of this book is genuinely gripping and the world-building is impressive. Unfortunately the second half rushes through everything and the ending feels unearned. Worth reading for the setup alone, but be prepared for a disappointing finish.

examples.review: Absolute trash. Poorly written, boring plot, total waste of money.
It was fine. Not great, not terrible. A decent read to pass the time.
A masterpiece. Every page pulled me deeper in. One of the best books I've ever read.
